description: A mechatronics engineering team's motor control library at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/motor_control has an in-progress Git merge from 'feature/adaptive-control' into 'main' with conflicts in three files. Resolve the conflicts in control/pid.py by merging the base PID logic with adaptive gain features to include both the integral clamp and adaptive rate adjustment. In control/motor_driver.py, merge the safety clamp and ramp-rate limiting such that the ramp limit is applied before the safety clamp. In control/filters.py, accept the feature branch changes renaming 'low_pass_filter' to 'exponential_filter' and adding 'moving_average_filter'. Ensure all conflict markers are removed, the test suite passes, and the merge is committed with a clean git status.
